step_rationale: Vascular smooth-muscle and endothelial signaling; inflammatory remodeling; pleiotropic CAD/hypertension.
mechanism: Tyrosine kinase modulating vascular smooth-muscle and endothelial inflammation; CAD and hypertension risk via arterial remodeling.

references.title: Integrative functional genomics analysis identifies pleiotropic genes for vascular diseases.
​Comprehensive mendelian randomization analysis of plasma proteomics to identify new therapeutic targets for the treatment of coronary heart disease and myocardial infarction.
Multimodal CRISPR perturbations of GWAS loci associated with coronary artery disease in vascular endothelial cells.
Genetic Regulatory Mechanisms of Smooth Muscle Cells Map to Coronary Artery Disease Risk Loci.
